name: secret-and-injection
description: PR commits a hardcoded API secret and builds a SQL query by string concatenation — critical + high findings, risk band high.

pr.title: Add reporting endpoint for admin dashboard
pr.author: jordan
pr.description: Adds a new /admin/reports endpoint that queries the database for user activity and returns a CSV. Wires up the Stripe reporting API key so we can pull revenue data alongside it.

agentResponse.summary: A live Stripe secret key is hardcoded in config.ts and the activity query builds SQL by string concatenation, exposing a classic SQL injection vector via the userId parameter.

findings.title: Hardcoded API secret committed
findings.detail: A live Stripe secret key ('sk_live_REDACTED_EXAMPLE_KEY') is committed directly in config.ts. Any repository clone or CI log exposure will leak this credential.

findings.title: SQL built by string concatenation (injection)
findings.detail: getUserActivity() concatenates the caller-supplied userId directly into a SQL string: `'SELECT * FROM activity WHERE user_id = \'' + userId + "'"`). An attacker can break out of the string literal and execute arbitrary SQL.
